captions.formal: Vehicles move through a multi-lane city street with motion blur in a long-exposure shot as golden light illuminates trees with yellow autumn foliage and urban buildings.
captions.sarcastic: A riveting high-speed chase through a city street, if you define high-speed as the motion blur of a few cars in a own-speed traffic jam.
captions.humorous_tech: The city traffic is running on a high-latency network with zero throughput and massive motion blur in the rendering-engine-driven sunset-golden-hour-patch-v2.0.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The city is moving way faster than my motivation to get out of bed on a Monday morning.

captions.formal: An orange ginger kitten walks through a sun-dappled, wooded area toward the camera through green foliage and tree trunks.
captions.sarcastic: A breathtaking display of locomotion by an orange kitten navigating a sun-dappled forest floor.
captions.humorous_tech: This ginger kitten's pathfinding algorithm is clearly broken and it is walking straight into a collision-detection error.
captions.humorous_non_tech: This tiny orange kitten is on a mission to conquer the forest, even though he is clearly just looking for a little nap.

captions.formal: A young Black woman with hair in a high bun works at a computer in a brightly lit, modern office, typing on a white keyboard while looking intently at a monitor.
captions.sarcastic: A breathtaking display of a woman typing on a keyboard in a modern office setting.
captions.humorous_tech: She is deep in the flow state and currently attempting to a single line of code that doesn't throw a 404 error.
captions.humorous_non_tech: She is staring at that monitor with the intensity of a person who just realized they left the stove on at home.
